Is there anyone online that can give me some advice on building my team and what to pull for? I just downloaded this game yesterday and made a thread in the gameplay discussion channel trying to get some advice but nobody responded yet.
Try out the standard units and the current banner units and see which one you like
Because there's a couple of ways you can make a team so I want to go by preference

I was intending to ask a bit more specifically about some of the units i've already pulled. I've been pulling on the aqueor realm banner and got one copy each of tulu, sanga, caecus, faros, and goliath. I really like tulu and the playstyle of the tentacle team and i'm unsure if i should keep pulling for more tentacle units/duplicates, pull for specific units in other banners, or pull for certain wheels at this point. I don't know how the best way to build this team would be, or what wheels each character needs.
You can go for one team first, then invest in more teams later down the line
You can use Tulu Caecus Sanga Nautila(standard chaos unit)
Or Tulu Caecus Goliath Sanga but Goliath really wants his dupes
The thing about aequor is that they are the most defensive realm
Aequor teams usually have 2 or more sustain units
Changing tentacle stances is important for certain teams as well
Usually you want to play into a certain mechanic
The sanga Nautila team focuses on tentacle dmg and sanga's exalt
While the Goliath team focuses on using tentacle damage to scale your other units

Thank you, that really helps a lot. I've been running the goliath version so far, but I like that defensive type of playstyle more so I will probably try to transisiton over to the nautila variant you described. 

As far as my standard pulls go, what would you say is the highest priority of what to target? For instance, should I try to get a certain amount of duplicates of certain characters before pulling for wheels, or should I get some specific wheels first? I don't even know who wants what wheel, but I assume they're pretty important.

I just got one of those primoridial potion things that lets you gain a specific standard unit, so I might just grab Nautila with that right now.
If you are going for the nautila team, then I suggest getting nautila wheel and sanga wheel
Nautila wheel gives a hefty amount of realm mastery so more shield in quiet sea
While sanga wheel gives more shields while also giving more death resistance for sanga's talent

Okay that's really helpful. I'll definitely try to grab those. I assume Caecus's wheel is less important in this team comp then? Also what about Tulu, is there a certain wheel I should be wanting to get for him? I think I saw someone say his wheel isn't in the standard pool so idk what I should seek to use on him.
Tulu wants incalculable factor or his wheel but it's not as important
His wheel is in standard pool but cannot be chosen
If you get it then you have good luck
How important are dupes and secondary teams in this game?
Caecus wheel is more important for retaliate teams, sure it does provide more bulk to your team as well but not as much as the nautila and sanga wheels
Ah okay that makes sense. Thank you so much for the help!
You also want to pull some nautila, sanga and caecus dupes
I'll want to do that after I get the two signature wheels right?
Or harder story stages that want a more specific team

Its a deckbuilding term referring to controlling the tempo of the game
Basically you try to mess with the enemy win conditions while you wittle them down with tulu, daf hat and bleed
Other terms are mulligan, aggro, tempo.

Uvhash wheel is core for that deck.
It deals more bleed the more cards your opponent has in hand
But not many people play ramp
I did until they nerfed potency to not work with wheels
ill try to get it maybe
If enemies had cards too, we can have a mulligan deck
to kill the enemy by making them overdraw
Not Land though, never add land cards
Tulu is usually used in control or tempo decks
Either by using a lot of paralyze units to benefit from the crit
Or by buffing tulu so his cards and exalt does way more damage then usual
-6 potency tulu in my back pocket
However the tulu in my team here is different
You usually can't spam his cards that much
And want to save 5 cost for a different turn
Because you want to force the enemy to either take the damage from playing cards or take damage from bleed
With the Hamelin one, you already have good sniping with tulu 4 cost, Hamelin 4 cost and gdoll exalt
So you want Uvhash wheel on aigis
While on the tawil team, you want to remove the enemies one by one, basically slowly pushing the enemy into an unwinnable situation
Aigis is also pretty important here since if they don't burst them down (either due to needing to use cards to snipe my other units or because they just can't)
She can petrify the highest threat
And they suddenly lose a lot of options
For example, Jenkins with double hat on him and petrified doll is basically a pass turn
